creator: jlmales@gmail.com
text: I had crossed referenced this bug to bug #240810 and bug #240804 on purpose to indicate there is some relationships between this and the other bugs.  This was done on purpose to show the relationship of these different bugs.  That was not meant to imply these different bugs should be consolidated into one bug re <https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=240804#c12> "This is one bug. with two strictly related problems."
